privileged_info_summary: The demodb database contains 17 total Profiles records, of which exactly 2 have Nationality='American' (john.smith@example.com and domi@nek.gov). The task requires creating a us_analytics role and us_partner user with a us_only_policy security policy that filters to show only American nationality records. All data is synthetically generated from hardcoded seed data in seed_demodb.py, not sourced from real external data sources.
